nodes.name: Webhook: Generate Ads
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/generate-ads. Body: { property_id }. Called by the dashboard's 'Generate ads' button OR auto-triggered when LISTING_SYNCED fires (set up via a second n8n workflow that polls agent_events, or by chaining from the Listing Agent's webhook responder).

nodes.name: Supabase: Get Previous Campaigns
nodes.notes: v2 (audit item 2.1): fetches the most recent 6 campaigns for this property so the Ad Agent can vary angles rather than repeat them. Returns empty array on first-ever generation; Code: Build Ad Body handles both cases.

nodes.name: Gemini: Draft Ad Copy
nodes.notes: EXPRESSION MODE on jsonBody. Single call returns all 3 platform creatives.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ property_id: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.property_id, project_name: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.project_name, platforms: ['Meta','Google','Portal'], total_budget_inr: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.meta.budget + $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.google.budget + $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.portal.budget, prev_campaign_count: $('Code: Build Ad Body').first().json.prevCampaignCount, novelty_note: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.novelty_note }) }}

={{ 'Drafted Meta, Google, Portal copy. Simulated total spend ₹' + (($('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.meta.budget + $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.google.budget + $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.portal.budget)/1000).toFixed(0) + 'K, blended CPL ₹' + Math.round(($('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.meta.cpl + $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.google.cpl + $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.portal.cpl)/3) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, property_id: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.property_id, project_name: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.project_name, platforms: { meta: { ad_copy: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.meta.ad_copy, cpl: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.meta.cpl }, google: { ad_copy: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.google.ad_copy, cpl: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.google.cpl }, portal: { ad_copy: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.portal.ad_copy, cpl: $('Code: Parse & Simulate').first().json.portal.cpl } } } }}

nodes.name: Code: Build Sheet Rows
nodes.notes: Splits the campaign generation into 3 rows (Meta/Google/Portal) so the sales head sees per-channel headline, budget, CTA in the Campaigns sheet.

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Append Campaign
nodes.notes: Appends every generated campaign to the 'Campaigns' tab — one row per channel (Meta + Google + Portal = 3 rows per Ad Agent run). Sales head sees creative + budget + status at a glance.
